svg.title: Gray-Scott pattern atlas
svg.desc: A pure-Python reaction-diffusion atlas for seeing how feed and kill steer sparse spots, worm bands, and denser labyrinths.
svg.text: A pure-Python reaction-diffusion atlas for seeing how feed and kill steer sparse spots, worm bands, and denser labyrinths.

text.tspan: The atlas uses the V concentration field after a fixed number of Euler steps.
It is not a full phase diagram; it is a reproducible visual packet that makes regime differences visible on day one.
